content.en:
As time passed, Ye Tian had been hiding here, waiting for the arrival of the high-level demon seed.

Finally this day.

A high-level demon seed is here!

"It's this high-level demon seed!"

Ye Tian stared at a high-level demon seed shuttling through the void in front of him and recognized the other party.

High-level demon seed - Kailin!

Previously, Ye Tian had encountered this high-level demon seed, but at that time, he had not yet condensed the fifth perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, and his strength was not as good as the other party, so he was killed by this high-level demon seed.

But this time, he was not afraid of the other party.

Wow!

The high-level demon seed Kailin came here to check out this Heavenly Vein Demon Gold ~ Ore Vein.

And soon, he discovered Ye Tian hidden in the dark.

"Look for death!"

This high-level demon seed struck out blatantly, shattering Ye Tian's hidden void with one blow, completely shattering this area and turning it into nothingness.

And Ye "" Tian was naturally forced out.

"It's you!"

The high-level demon seed Kailin looked shocked.

He remembered that he had obviously killed Ye Tian, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to be alive.

Whoa!!!!

Ye Tian's replica body appeared, a total of five replica bodies, and it should not be a problem to besiege the high-level demon seed Kailin.

"Five!"

The high-level demon seed Kailin realized that Ye Tian had multiple clones, and the last time he killed should have been only one of them.

It is almost impossible for the realm god to have a clone, because an ordinary doppelganger is useless, at most he can only refine an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm clone, unless he allows the Eternal Dao Realm clone to cultivate step by step and cultivate to this level.

It can be said that he has almost never heard of a clone at the level of the high-level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

And the five doppelgangers are even more terrifying!

Of course, he also knew that Ye Tian's cultivation had not reached the high level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, so he didn't care too much.

"You five doppelgangers, all of them will die for me!"

The high-level demon seed Kailin continued to attack Ye Tian.

But soon, he was confused.

Ye Tian's strength had even reached the high-level combat power of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Thundered!!!!

The high-level demon seed Kailin was completely suppressed by Ye Tian's five copy bodies, and Ye Tian also possessed the Tianyan Xuan Tortoise Shell and Tianyan Scale Armor Technique, two perfect-level defense eternal realm spirit techniques, and there was also the Tianyan Peng Light Technique above the speed, which made Ye Tian extremely difficult.

Soon.

After the high-level demon seed Kailin cast a killing move, and hit Ye Tian's defensive body, he was actually blocked by the two perfect defensive eternal realm spiritual techniques of Tianyan Xuan Tortoise Shell and Tianyan Scale Armor Technique.

In fact, he did defeat the outermost layer of the Tianyan Xuan Tortoise Shell, but he did not break the innermost layer of the Tianyan Scale Armor Technique.

"That's right, sure enough, it's necessary to choose the Eternal Realm Spirit of the stacked defense type!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, only when you are alive can you have output!

He already has an attack-type Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, so naturally there is no need to choose an attack-type Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, which does not increase his strength much.

But the defense can be stacked, and as long as the defense is strong enough, he can surround and kill the enemy.

This was also the reason why he chose the fifth Eternal Realm Spirit as the Heavenly Profound Tortoise.

......

Time passed, and the high-level demon seed Kailin gradually became more and more injured.

He wanted to escape.

However, how could Ye Tian let him escape!

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian burned the Eternal Dao Seed, and burst out with even more terrifying strength to intercept the high-level demon seed Kailin, and various techniques to suppress and imprison this area were also performed.

In this case, the high-level demon seed Kailin had no way to escape.

In desperation, he could only choose to call for help.

Ye Tian still had no way to intercept Kailin's call for help, but he also sensed that Kailin had sent a distress call to the outside world.

"We must kill Kailin as soon as possible, otherwise there will be another high-level demon seed, and I won't be able to kill the two high-level demon seeds!"

So, he also began to fight desperately, frantically fighting against this high-level demon seed.

It didn't take long.

This high-level demon seed Kailin was killed by Ye Tian and turned into a corpse.

"Finally killed him!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief. []

But the price he paid was also very large, the three replica bodies were severely damaged, and although the other two replica bodies were not severely damaged, the Eternal Dao Seed also burned a lot, and the origin was damaged.

But as long as this high-level demon seed is killed, it will be worth it.

Immediately.

Ye Tian quickly took away the corpse of this high-level demon seed, and then left quickly.

He didn't have time to check the materials and treasures on this high-level demon seed, and if he delayed a little time, he might run into other high-level demon seeds.

......

Beyond the Boundary.

Ye Tian came out and immediately returned to the Terran Holy Kingdom.

After returning to the Terran Holy Kingdom, he began to check the treasure resources on the high-level demon seed Kailin.

"It's worthy of being a high-level demon seed, and the resources on my body are really a lot, although almost all of them are useful resources for demon seeds, and they will make the gods and demons of the realm transform, but they are suitable for me. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Other than that.

He also found a lot of resources for refining high-level demon seeds, including a lot of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

Obviously, this high-level demon didn't have a weapon of his own, and if he had such a powerful weapon, he might still be able to escape.

In addition to the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, there are also a lot of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances that help refine the Eternal Demon Seed, and the amount is very large.

"This time I made a lot of money, or I earned more by killing high-level demon seeds!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he didn't know if the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material in his current hand would be able to raise his Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit, and there was a high probability that it wouldn't work.

In the following years, Ye Tian did not go to that boundary crack again, but tried his best to improve his Eternal Dao Species, and tried to extract Heavenly Vein Demon Gold from the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore.

However, he was not a high-level cultivator of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and it was still very difficult to extract the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore from the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore.

So, he continued to research, wanting to create a special Eternal Dao Secret Technique to extract the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

After countless researches, the deduction was created.

this day.

Ye Tian finally researched it.

He named this Eternal Dao Secret Technique the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Extraction Technique, which could only be used to extract the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

However, if this Celestial Vein Demon Gold Extraction Technique wants to extract a piece of Celestial Vein Demon Gold Ore, it will also take a long time, and it will not be able to be extracted quickly.

Ye Tian had a lot of copy bodies, so he didn't worry about the time problem, he let the three copy bodies keep extracting the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore, so that the efficiency was much faster.

After a long time.

Ye Tian successfully extracted the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold from a piece of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore.
